templates.label: Vase | Magnifying color
templates.description: A beautiful example of a flower vase with vibrant colors, created by the community member Mads. The prompt used for this edit was: 'change the petals to blue'.

templates.label: Lamp | Text-only generation
templates.description: A sleek and modern desk lamp,. The prompt used for this edit was: 'A desk lamp'. This example demonstrates the ability to generate a 3D model solely based on a text prompt, without relying on an input image.

templates.label: Bibilabu | A Banana Cat
templates.description: A fun meme example of a cat with a banana on its head, created by the community member Bibilabu. The prompt used for this edit was: 'turn the cover into a cat with a banana on its head'.
